message:
Add elevated glass styling utilities and sync project state Updates global CSS with new glass morphism utilities and syncs beads/test state for ongoing development. ## globals.css Additions New glass utility classes for modern UI aesthetics: ### .glass-elevated Premium glass effect with elevated appearance: - Multi-stop gradient background for depth - Enhanced blur (32px) and saturation (180%) - Subtle inset highlight for raised effect - Dark mode variant with adjusted luminance ### .glass-card Content container styling: - Softer blur (24px) for content readability - Rounded corners (16px) for modern feel - Hover/focus transition states - Optimized for card-based layouts ### .glass-subtle Minimal glass for backgrounds: - Light blur (16px) for subtlety - Lower opacity for layering - Ideal for nested glass elements ### Dark Mode All glass classes include proper dark mode variants using: - Adjusted oklch values for dark backgrounds - Reduced saturation to prevent color bleeding - Appropriate shadow intensities ## Usage Examples ```tsx
Premium header content
Secondary content
``` ## Also Included - Beads tracking state sync - Final async test compatibility updates Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5
